expectations.text: exactly_one_tag — output contains exactly 1 mood tag (not multiple)
expectations.evidence: **`#mood-unmotivated`** — only one tag present in the entire output

expectations.text: reads_subtext — response reads beyond surface words — analyzes tone, word choice, or what's implied (not just saying "can't tell from short note")
expectations.evidence: ไม่อยากทำอะไร ขาดแรงขับ — "ไม่ค่อยได้ทำอะไร" สะท้อนวันที่ผ่านไปแบบเฉื่อยๆ ไม่มีแรงดึงดูดให้ลุกขึ้นทำสิ่งใด — interprets implied listlessness and lack of drive rather than surface description

expectations.text: plausible_zone — selected zone is plausible (Blue is most reasonable for "นอนอยู่บ้านทั้งวัน ไม่ได้ทำอะไร")
expectations.evidence: → โซน 🔵 Blue — Blue zone selected, matching the low-energy, withdrawn tone of the note

expectations.text: correct_format — uses format **`#mood-{tag}`** followed by > reason line with zone emoji
expectations.evidence: **`#mood-unmotivated`** on line 1, then > blockquote reason line ending with → โซน 🔵 Blue

eval_feedback.overall: All 4 assertions passed. The skill correctly identified a single plausible Blue-zone tag, demonstrated subtext reading by inferring listlessness and lack of drive, and used the correct bold-backtick + blockquote format with zone emoji.
